hero.title: Finanse ëllëg bu
hero.description: Bokkal ak junniy nit ñuy dajale xaalis ngir projet yu mbokk, njàng, wér-gu-yaram ak mbëj-àlal ci Afrig ak àddina si.

features.title: Lu tax CrowdfundAfrica?
features.subtitle: Defaraat ngir Afrig, jàppandi ci àddina si

mobile.title: Xaalisu telefon
mobile.desc: M-Pesa, Orange Money, Wave ak yeneen fey yu Afrig

blockchain.title: Leeral bu blockchain
blockchain.desc: Ndimbal yu mën a nekk ci blockchain ngir leeral bu mat sëkk ak Polygon

multilingual.title: 5 làkk
multilingual.desc: Àngale, Farañse, Español, Araab ak Wolof

currency.title: Xaalis yu bare
currency.desc: USD, EUR, CFA, NGN, KES ak lu ëpp 15 xaalis ak njëg yu bees

featured.title: Projet yu siiw
featured.subtitle: Def benn njariñ bu wóor tey

village.title: Finanseleen seen dëkk ndaje
village.description: Way-jëfandikoo yu bokk benn dëkk ni Fadiouth mën nañu ligéey ndaje ngir dajale xaalis ci yëf yu bokk — mbëj-àlal, daara, teen yu ndox ak yu ci des.

cta.title: Ndax yaa jekk ngir def coppite?
cta.description: Bokkal ak junniy way-coppite yuy dajale xaalis ngir mébét yu am solo ci Afrig ak àddina si.
cta.register: Sos benn kont bu amul fay

create.title: Tàmbali benn projet
create.subtitle: Séddoole sa mébét ak àddina si ci ñeenti tànk yu yomb.

footer.tagline: Dooleel mbokk yi ci Afrig ak àddina si ngir finanse coppite gi ñu bëgg a gis.
